scripts.slackbot:delivery-regression: pnpm --filter centaur-slackbot exec vitest run test/runtime-control.test.ts test/slack-stream.test.ts test/slack-markdown.test.ts test/slack-delivery.test.ts test/dashboard-to-slack.test.ts test/bot.test.ts test/attachment-refetch.test.ts
